programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will be possible, among others,to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Around the world in a camper
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Around the world in a camper
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Master chef Pascal Brodnicki shows viewers how to replace traditional dishes with Asian dishes.It proves that preparing an original dinner is simple and does not have to cost much.In search of culinary inspiration, he goes to Vietnam, Laos and Thailand.He shops at local markets, prepares and sells snacks on the street, and works on a rice plantation.To prove himself, he prepares exotic dishes for his Asian hosts.He tries grilled gecko and baked ant larvae, and accepts an invitation to an unusual hunt.

programme.title: Africa Express
programme.desc: For the first time, the race will take participants through Africa.They will cover the route through Kenya and Tanzania - from the foot of Kilimanjaro, through the crowded streets of Arusha, to the sand dunes by the Indian Ocean and historic Mombasa, ending the competition in Nairobi.Eight couples: Ewa Gawryluk-Domaniecka with her husband Piotr Domaniecki, Edyta Zając with her partner Michał Mikołajczak, Nikodem Rozbicki with her friend Paweł Kurkowski, Wiktoria Gąsiewska with her brother Mateusz Gąsiewski, Tomasz Iwan with her partner Karolina Woźniak, Katarzyna Niezgoda with her husband Paweł Markiewicz, Izu Ugonoh with his wife Antonina Ugonoh and MonikaHoffman-Piszora, together with her sister Iga Hoffman, faces the challenges of harsh, unpredictable nature - lack of roads, difficult access to water and communication, time pressure and their own emotions.The program will be hosted by Iza Krzan.Every day, participants must demonstrate perseverance, cooperation and resilience, learning about completely different faces of Africa.It's a test of boundaries and a lesson in friendship The stakes are high in this episode - it's a competition for the last ticket to Kenya.The three immune couples relax at Tanga Marine Park while the rest of the contestants learn that the previously eliminated duo is back in the game.On a sisal plantation in Ngomeni, they must, with the support of local workers, separate and prepare the fibers for spinning, facing a language barrier.Then, there is a fight for the amulet at Lake Tongoni - the participants carry salt through the pool on a wobbly base, which requires precision and cooperation.The finale takes everyone to the Amboni Caves, where, led by a shaman, participants perform a ritual for the spirit of Mabawu among hundreds of bats.The last ticket to Kenya will go to the duo that can best cope with the challenges and demonstrate the greatest cooperation.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The second season of the program about Poles who decided to put everything on one card and prove that the life of an emigrant can be full of success.This season, Tomasz Kin will once again meet extraordinary people who found their happiness abroad.The protagonist of the series will include Radosław Malinowski, a lawyer living in Nairobi, who helps victims of human trafficking.Viewers will also meet Mieczysław Sobczak, known as Dziki Mietek, who lives in Peru and is a renowned local shaman and herbalist.The creators of the documentary will also present a hockey coach living in Canada - Jarosław Byrski.His pupils include:such stars as: Brent Burns, Bryan Bickell, and Rick Nash.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world Martyna Wojciechowska meets the most extraordinary animal guardian in the world.Shirley takes care of baby kangaroos whose mothers were killed by cars.He cares for them until they are twelve months old.The park, which she founded with her husband Russell, is home to one hundred kangaroos, fifty wallabies and thirteen koalas.Monotremes, crocodiles, turtles, emus, cockatoos, peacocks, guinea fowls, turkeys and... domestic chickens also live here.Thirty thousand visitors visit Pardana Wildlife every year.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska, the heroine of the episode, Nidialys Acosta Cabrera, guides Martyna Wojciechowska around a country where absurdities known to Poles from the times of the Polish People's Republic are commonplace.She is one of the few women driving a taxi in Havana.Her car is also an exception - a pink Chevrolet from the 1950s. Sometimes she changes it to a blue Chevrolet.He chooses the color of nail polish to match the color of the bodywork.Her first and favorite car was a Fiat 126 p - a car still popular on the island.The episode will feature a large dose of Cuban music and humor straight from Bareja's comedy.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.desc: Shocking accounts of people who experienced encounters with creatures from out of this world.

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: A team of paranormal experts travels around the UK searching for signs of supernatural beings in homes.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne and his wife watch rare and supernatural activity caught on camera.Jack tries to convince his skeptical parents to believe in something that seems out of this world.

programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will be possible, among others,to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Mountain Life 2
programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.desc: Families who decided to live in mountain retreats will be shown.The creators visit the characters in their dream homes.To do this, they travel the world, from Appalachia to Hawaii.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Aloha, new home
programme.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska continues to look at the agritourism farm.He will explain how to deal with an interior full of slopes.He will point out how the owners hid the mirror in the window.He will also explain why each room should have a piece of furniture that stands out from others.Viewers will also learn how a tree can be transformed into a comfortable seat.The spa area will surprise you with a sauna in the shape of a bathyscaphe with a wonderful view of the forest.The host will have the opportunity to make a film dream come true.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: In the first episode, the host meets the owners of houses on four wheels.Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits families who decided to spend the summer in trailers and campers.A family from Łódź, Krzysztof and Anna, together with their six children, go on holiday to their trailer by the sea every year.Their summer house was decorated in the style of French Provence.In turn, Ewelina and Jędrzej from Radom and their two daughters lived in a camper with a charming boho style.Meanwhile, Marek and Ewelina have been traveling around the world together for over 8 years.They finally managed to buy their own van, thanks to which they can move around without any problems.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits unusual houses, located in charming natural surroundings.The host will watch, among others:Dutch houses, barges, trailers, and houses made of containers.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: Each country has its own traditional dishes.Unusual dishes include:baked bats or bee larvae in honey.Jarosław Nowak gets to know the strangest cuisines in the world.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: This time, Jarosław Nowak's goal is Kazakhstan.It is a country of contrasts, where you can see wild, green steppes and, on the other hand, modern, rapidly developing cities.First, the host visits Almaty, where he tries to discover what Kazakhs consider the strangest delicacy.He sees a traditional slaughterhouse and the world's largest camel farm.His plate includes sheep's head, camel meat and horse meat, which the local population considers to be Kazakh doping.According to culinary tradition and ancient customs, no part of the dish can be wasted, and the preparation of the dish itself is a real celebration.
